Title: Illegal Blockade - Seeking Nine Tails Fleet Responsible
Description:
Crusader Security has learned that the criminal organization known as the Nine Tails have set an illegal blockade around ~mission(Location) and stopped all incoming and outgoing quantum traffic in the sector.

The outlaw fleet must be located, and the blockade terminated.

We are urgently requesting any trained security professionals in the system to join Crusader Security forces and protect our scanning ships as they seek out the location of the Nine Tails fleet causing this blockade.

Please bear in mind that with quantum travel disabled and numerous hostiles in the area, this should be considered a high-risk operation. Proper equipment and a full tank of fuel is strongly recommended for all pilots joining this emergency response effort. 

CONTRACT AUTHORIZED BY:
Director Sasha Rust
ID# 122L964G
